subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1915 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: By Him Who is, in truth, the One God, and there is none other God but Him! Should the loved ones act in accordance with the counsels of the Blessed Beauty, verily the kings shall bow down in submission [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فوالله الذی لا اله الا هو اگر احباب بوصایای جمال مبارک عمل نمایند ملوک خاضع
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @words vs deeds, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
